reasoning: The Krishak Bandhu and Khadya Sathi have put real food on my table and money in my hand when I needed it — that is not something to throw away lightly. Yes, I am angry about the relief money disappearing in our panchayat's hands, and that shakes my trust in local leaders, but voting for a Matua minister from Delhi will not stop that stealing. That is a problem with our own people taking cuts, not something BJP can fix. At the national level, Shantanu Thakur still feels like outside interference, and if I vote BJP, I risk losing the welfare programs that actually help a small farmer like me survive.
primary_drivers: Fear of losing Krishak Bandhu and Khadya Sathi if TMC loses power
Distrust of BJP as an outside force trying to reshape Bengal
Anger at local corruption but recognition this is not a national-level vote issue
